Package local.alejandrogb.metricsservers.api.resources.servidor

Class ServidorResource

java.lang.Object
local.alejandrogb.metricsservers.api.resources.servidor.ServidorResource

    • removeServicios

      @DELETE @Path("/{id}/servicios") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response removeServicios(@PathParam("id") int servidorId, List<Integer> servicioIds)

    • getMetrics
